Name: FallingParam
Description: Defines parameters related to fall damage.

Fields.Name: Breakpoint [1] - Damage %
Fields.Description: Percentage of HP lost if fall distance is at the first breakpoint.

Fields.Name: Breakpoint [2] - Damage %
Fields.Description: Percentage of HP lost if fall distance is at the second breakpoint.

Fields.Name: Breakpoint [3] - Damage %
Fields.Description: Percentage of HP lost if fall distance is at the third breakpoint.

Fields.Name: Breakpoint [4] - Damage %
Fields.Description: Percentage of HP lost if fall distance is at the fourth breakpoint.
